# Glucose-Lowering Medications (High-Risk) (hypoglycemics_high_risk)

**18 rules.** Category: metabolic

| canonical_id | db | severity | evidence | alert_headline | mechanism |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `aloe_vera` | ingredient_quality_map | monitor | theoretical | May add to diabetes-med effects | Possible additive glucose-lowering. Oral aloe may also alter drug absorption via laxative effects. |
| `alpha_lipoic_acid` | ingredient_quality_map | caution | probable | May add to diabetes-med effects | Additive insulin-sensitizing effect may increase hypoglycemia risk, especially with insulin and sulfonylureas. |
| `berberine_supplement` | ingredient_quality_map | avoid | established | May boost your diabetes medication | Additive glucose-lowering comparable to metformin. Also inhibits CYP3A4/CYP2D6, potentially increasing drug levels of co-administered medications. |
| `bitter_melon` | ingredient_quality_map | caution | probable | May add to diabetes-med effects | Additive glucose-lowering effect, especially with sulfonylureas and insulin. |
| `black_seed_oil` | ingredient_quality_map | caution | probable | May add to diabetes-med effects | Additive glucose-lowering via PPAR-gamma activation and beta-cell stimulation. Risk of symptomatic hypoglycemia particularly with sulfonylureas and insulin. |
| `chromium` | ingredient_quality_map | monitor | probable | May add to diabetes-med effects | Potential additive glucose-lowering effect. |
| `cinnamon` | ingredient_quality_map | monitor | probable | May add to diabetes-med effects | Potential additive glucose-lowering effect with diabetes medications. |

| `fenugreek` | ingredient_quality_map | caution | probable | May add to diabetes-med effects | Additive glucose-lowering and fiber-mediated delay of oral medication absorption. |
| `fiber` | ingredient_quality_map | monitor | probable | May add to diabetes-med effects | Fiber delays absorption of co-administered oral medications including metformin and sulfonylureas. |
| `ginseng` | ingredient_quality_map | monitor | probable | May add to diabetes-med effects | Mild additive glucose-lowering effect. |
| `gymnema_sylvestre` | ingredient_quality_map | caution | probable | May add to diabetes-med effects | Additive glucose-lowering effect via multiple mechanisms. |

| `psyllium` | ingredient_quality_map | monitor | established | May add to diabetes-med effects | Fiber delays absorption of co-administered oral medications including metformin and sulfonylureas. |
| `stinging_nettle` | ingredient_quality_map | caution | probable | May add to diabetes-med effects | Alpha-glucosidase inhibitory and insulin secretagogue properties of nettle extract create additive hypoglycemic risk with antidiabetic drugs, particularly sulfonylureas and insuli… |
| `tribulus` | ingredient_quality_map | monitor | probable | May add to diabetes-med effects | Additive glucose-lowering effect demonstrated in RCT. Risk of hypoglycemia when combined with insulin, sulfonylureas, or other hypoglycemic agents. |
| `vanadyl_sulfate` | ingredient_quality_map | caution | probable | May add to diabetes-med effects | Insulin-mimetic activity creates additive hypoglycemia risk. Narrow therapeutic window. |
| `vitamin_b3_niacin` | ingredient_quality_map | caution | established | May add to diabetes-med effects | Niacin can raise blood glucose, potentially requiring adjustment of diabetes medication doses. |
